quote_of_day.text:
>>5625
and yet you do, without escape, like everyone else, without exception, because there is no escape. you chose this, observe and learn.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of casteist claims moved into the board, bringing scattered showers of inflammatory statements. Anon's assertion that flushing a toilet makes one a Dalit sparked a brief but intense downpour of responses.

Meanwhile, a heat wave of masculine posturing swept across the board as an anon started a dick-posting thread, drawing a large number of replies. This phenomenon persisted for several hours, with a steady stream of contributions.

In contrast, a fog of nonsensical messaging rolled in later in the day, with one anon sharing a cryptic message that read 'huehuehuekhekhekhe'.

A high-pressure system of self-aggrandizement also lingered, as another anon claimed to have spent months in 'MoanVrat' and credited a 'GORA admin' for their newfound freedom.

articles.title: Anon Claims to Have Spent Months in 'MoanVrat', Credits 'GORA admin' for Freedom
articles.body:
Anon posted a message expressing relief at being back on the board after a months-long period of abstinence, which they referred to as 'MoanVrat'. They claimed to have felt like they lost their voice after 'Dyaush' pulled the plug overnight.

In the post, Anon addressed the admin, referring to them as 'GORA admin', and offered a 'pajeeta' as compensation for their absence. They also mentioned that once they have a job, they will donate something to the admin.

Another anon responded by claiming to be the 'GORA admin' and stated they are Indian. They refused to disclose more information about themselves, fearing they might be traced by 'pajeet doval'.

One anon asked if the original poster had cleared the bank PO exam, and the OP denied it, claiming to be a 'cheap spinoff of yui anan'.

Another anon brought up the topic of the OP's age and planned suicide, while a different anon asked for personal details such as age, caste, qualification, and expected CTC.

The conversation also involved discussions about the 'GORA admin's' identity, with one anon stating that the admin was a mod who was 'just fucking around'.

The OP later mentioned plans to join an orphanage or a monastery when they grow old. The thread included various exchanges, with some anons questioning the OP's claims and others making inquiries about their personal life.

One anon referenced a previous post, and there was a brief discussion about the OP's employment status.

articles.title: Anon claims flushing toilet makes one a Dalit
articles.body:
Anon sparked a discussion by stating that anyone who flushes a toilet is a Dalit, suggesting that only those who hire others to do such tasks, like 'real UCs' (upper castes), maintain their status.

Anon argued that any type of cleaning of human waste relegates one to Dalit tier.

Another anon responded by questioning if the OP flushes their own toilet or has a Dalit hired to do it, implying the OP might be a Dalit themselves.

A respondent called the OP 'based UC,' a term that seemed to mock the original poster's claim of upper-caste status.

The conversation took a humorous turn with an anon stating that if one cleans their own toilet, they become ritually a Dalit, and that no technology, including AI or robotics, could change this.

One participant shared their experience of using a traditional toilet that requires cleaning by Dalits every six months. Some anons reacted with skepticism and ridicule. A respondent expressed indifference to street cleanliness, stating they defecate in public.

Another simply accepted the label, saying 'fine, I'm a Dalit.' The discussion reflects a mix of serious and facetious comments on caste and hygiene practices.

articles.title: Anon starts dick-posting thread
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread titled 'ITT: post your dicks' and started it by posting an image of their dick.

Another anon expressed a desire to participate but was hesitant, saying they didn't want to be one of the first to share their dick with a bunch of dudes instead of a woman.

One respondent warned others about the thread, claiming it was a trap and referencing a past experience where they got 'gobard' after participating.

As the thread progressed, an anon joked that one-third of the board had now exposed their dick to each other, describing it as an 'absolute state'.

The thread also included various exchanges, including one anon asking about the caste of the OP and another making a crude comment about fucking anything when horny. Some anons engaged in dick-posting, with one receiving a response saying 'Fuck it's so thick.

You can have my gori ma anytime.' The thread included several instances of anons telling others to hide or stop posting explicit content, with one saying 'wtf hide that shit'.

articles.title: Anon shares nonsensical message
articles.body: Anon posted 'huehuehuekhekhekhe'. Other anons responded with short, often nonsensical messages. One anon said 'you chose this, observe and learn.' Another anon asked for clarification on a picture. The conversation quickly devolved into more short, confusing posts. Anon replied with 'I just cannot take anything you say seriously.'
